nodes.label: ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md
nodes.description: Global operating manual. Loads at start of every session. Hosts @file imports.
nodes.publicDescription: The root rules file. Loads at the start of every session and pulls in the knowledge files via @file imports.

nodes.label: memory/MEMORY.md
nodes.description: Auto-loaded memory index. Persists across sessions.
nodes.publicDescription: Auto-loaded memory index. Persists across sessions.

nodes.label: memory/lessons.md
nodes.description: Short-rule extract for runtime. Boris loop. Re-injected by SessionStart hook.
nodes.publicDescription: Short-rule extract for runtime. Re-injected on every session start so corrections never get lost.

nodes.label: ~/Desktop/HOME/CLAUDE.md
nodes.description: Entry point at HOME. Routes by venture. Owns Artifacts rule.
nodes.publicDescription: Entry point at the home directory. Routes work to the right venture folder.

nodes.label: current.md (live priority cache · daily P0/P1 stack)
nodes.description: Walker Framework hot cache · daily priority stack. Updated by /eod-sync.
nodes.publicDescription: Daily priority cache. Updated at end-of-day. Holds what's hot today, never stale.

nodes.label: jj-profile.md
nodes.description: V5 KB condensed · identity, voice, frameworks, current focus.
nodes.publicDescription: Condensed identity file: voice, frameworks, current focus. Loaded every session.

nodes.label: agent-roster.md
nodes.description: Single source of truth for agent inventory. Never hardcoded elsewhere.
nodes.publicDescription: Single source of truth for the agent inventory. Never hardcoded elsewhere.

nodes.label: lessons.md
nodes.description: Full corrections log. Boris loop. Companion to memory/lessons.md.
nodes.publicDescription: Full corrections log. Every correction the operator gives gets logged here, then collapsed into the lessons cache.

nodes.label: data-flow.md
nodes.description: Data classification + PII scan. MUST READ before any external service call.
nodes.publicDescription: Data classification + PII scan rules. Required read before any external service call.

nodes.label: system-architecture-references.md
nodes.description: Boris/Ruben/community synthesis · planning research.
nodes.publicDescription: Synthesis of community architecture references. Planning ground truth.

nodes.label: index.md
nodes.description: Topic → file path map. Pre-Pinecone retrieval (until Phase 11).
nodes.publicDescription: Topic to file map. Hand-rolled retrieval layer until vector search lands.

nodes.label: people.md (relationship map · collision rules · firewall flags)
nodes.description: Relationship map. Collision rules · firewall flags (Gavin, Kat Miller, Lex).
nodes.publicDescription: Relationship map with collision rules and firewall flags. Read on-trigger when a request involves a named person.

nodes.label: debug-playbook.md
nodes.description: 10 enumerated failure modes + escalation tier + incidents log.
nodes.publicDescription: Enumerated failure modes plus an escalation tier and incidents log.

nodes.label: frameworks.md
nodes.description: JJ's mental models, decision patterns, hard-won frameworks.
nodes.publicDescription: Mental models, decision patterns, and hard-won frameworks. Read on-trigger when one applies to the current decision.

nodes.label: content-voice.md
nodes.description: Multi-surface voice scaffolding. Read before any external content draft.
nodes.publicDescription: Multi-surface voice scaffolding. Read before any external content draft.

nodes.label: lessons-archive.md
nodes.description: Deprecated rules · history, never deleted.
nodes.publicDescription: Deprecated rules. Kept for history, never deleted.

nodes.label: JFly.Ai/CLAUDE.md
nodes.description: Customer-facing company. Brand + consulting + product layers.
nodes.publicDescription: Customer-facing brand and product context. Routes to brand, consulting, and live-site sub-folders.

children.label: Branding/CLAUDE.md
children.description: Brand master. Time Machine direction. Hero line locked.
children.publicDescription: Brand master file. Holds the visual language, voice, and locked decisions.

nodes.label: Collective360/CLAUDE.md (events: Coloween, Resolution NYE)
nodes.description: JJ Walker LLC · events (Coloween, Resolution NYE).
nodes.publicDescription: Events business context file.

nodes.label: RealEstate/CLAUDE.md (Walker Properties · 3 props, 2 LLCs)
nodes.description: Walker Properties · 3 props, 2 LLCs.
nodes.publicDescription: Real estate context file. Property portfolio operating notes.

nodes.label: Finances/CLAUDE.md
nodes.description: Personal + entity-level finance. SUGGEST ONLY default tier.
nodes.publicDescription: Finance context file. Defaults to a propose-only autonomy tier — the agent never moves money on its own.

nodes.label: Taxes/CLAUDE.md
nodes.description: Entity tax docs.
nodes.publicDescription: Entity tax document context.

nodes.label: chief-of-staff.md
nodes.description: THE Day-1 agent. Plays all roles directly until directors spin up.
nodes.publicDescription: The Day-1 agent. Plays every director role directly until real pain triggers a spin-up.

nodes.label: CFO / Finance Director
nodes.description: Trigger: 3+ financial questions/week + CoS overloaded.
nodes.publicDescription: Spins up when finance questions exceed what the Chief of Staff can carry.

nodes.label: CMO / Content Director
nodes.description: Trigger: real pain — first time JJ catches CoS producing flat content 3+ times.
nodes.publicDescription: Spins up the first time the Chief of Staff produces flat content three times in a row.

nodes.label: Research Director
nodes.description: Trigger: research >30 min through CoS.
nodes.publicDescription: Spins up when research routinely exceeds 30 minutes through the Chief of Staff.

nodes.label: Real Estate Director
nodes.description: Trigger: refi/transaction active OR 2+ tenant issues/month.
nodes.publicDescription: Spins up during an active transaction or when tenant issues stack up.

nodes.label: Events / Ops / BD Directors
nodes.description: Trigger: real pain per agent-roster.md.
nodes.publicDescription: Spin up on real pain — per the agent roster.

nodes.label: hooks/session-start.sh
nodes.description: Fires on startup, resume, clear, compact. Re-injects key state.
nodes.publicDescription: Fires on startup, resume, clear, and compact. Re-injects key state so context never silently drops.

nodes.label: output-styles/executive-brief.md
nodes.description: Default response style. Short, headlines first, plain English.
nodes.publicDescription: Default response style. Short. Headlines first. Plain English.

nodes.label: output-styles/research-deep.md
nodes.description: Research output. Lead with answer. Cite or flag.
nodes.publicDescription: Research output style. Lead with the answer. Cite or flag the gap.

nodes.label: ~/.claude/skills/ (78 installed)
nodes.description: 78 installed. morning-briefing, eod-sync, decision-filter, outreach-prep, etc.
nodes.publicDescription: Installed skills library — the agent's tool palette for routine work.

nodes.label: Pinecone · vector retrieval
nodes.description: Phase 11. Replaces hand-rolled index.md as primary retrieval.
nodes.publicDescription: Vector retrieval. Replaces the hand-rolled topic index as primary retrieval.

autoLoad.publicHtml: The global rules file pulls in priority cache, profile, agent roster, lessons, data-flow, architecture refs, and the topic index on every session start.

autoLoad.html: SessionStart hook (matchers: startup, resume, clear, compact) re-injects memory/lessons.md top rules + current.md P0/P1 stack
autoLoad.publicHtml: The session-start hook (startup, resume, clear, compact) re-injects the top lessons plus the live priority cache.

autoLoad.html: Folder-level CLAUDE.md loads when JJ enters that folder (Finances, JFly.Ai, Collective360, etc.)
autoLoad.publicHtml: Folder-level context files load automatically when work moves into that folder.

autoLoad.html: memory/MEMORY.md auto-loaded by Claude Code memory system
autoLoad.publicHtml: The memory index auto-loads via the runtime memory system.

onTrigger.html: people.md — when a request involves a named person (collision rules, firewall flags)
onTrigger.publicHtml: Relationship map — read when a request involves a named person.

onTrigger.html: debug-playbook.md — when JJ says "something's broken" or a known failure mode appears
onTrigger.publicHtml: Debug playbook — read when something is broken or a known failure mode appears.

onTrigger.html: frameworks.md — when a known framework applies to the current decision
onTrigger.publicHtml: Frameworks — read when a known mental model applies to the current decision.

onTrigger.html: data-flow.md — re-read before any external service call (Gmail, NotebookLM, public post, lender email)
onTrigger.publicHtml: Data-flow rules — re-read before any external service call.
Voice scaffolding — read before drafting any external-facing content.

onTrigger.html: JFly.Ai/Branding/CLAUDE.md — before any public-facing JFly.Ai copy or visual change
onTrigger.publicHtml: Brand master — read before any public-facing copy or visual change.
